title: Dissonance
description: One more Minecraft to Discord (and vice-versa) linking mod!
body:
# Dissonance

...is one more Discord <-> Minecraft linking mod. It supports modding platforms (currently NeoForge and Fabric), has a ton of configuration options, and is always open to new features!

[![A badge saying "runs on Fabric"](https://img.shields.io/badge/runs_on-fabric-d8ceb2?labelColor=181825&style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![A badge saying "runs on NeoForge"](https://img.shields.io/badge/runs_on-neoforge-dc762c?labelColor=181825&style=for-the-badge)](https://neoforged.net/)
[![A badge linking to the Dissonance GitHub repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github&logoColor=cdd6f4&labelColor=181825&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/sylvxa/Dissonance)
[![A badge linking to Sylvie's Discord server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1282059964935831664?logo=discord&logoColor=cdd6f4&label=discord&labelColor=181825&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.com/invite/5qzrB98sBA)

Look at the [setup documentation](https://dissonance.sylvie.lol/setup/base_configuration.html) for how to get Dissonance working.

More advanced configuration (and a lot of it!) can be found on the [extra setup](https://dissonance.sylvie.lol/setup/post_configuration.html) page.

![A screenshot showing the Minecraft to Discord part of the mod, consisting of a player joining, saying "meow", and leaving](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0fec54901124d054963395b2053cae38def519_0.webp)

## Credits

- [DiscordSRV](https://modrinth.com/plugin/discordsrv) - the idea of using Discord for proximity chat (and some other inspirations)
- ...and players like you. Thank you!

---

<sub>and, like always, this was</sub>

[![made with love](https://img.shields.io/badge/made_with_love-by_sylvie_<3-fab387?labelColor=181825&style=for-the-badge)](https://sylvie.lol/)
